mapper.sql: id, api_type, config_name, provider_type, config_json, enabled, is_current, description, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from api_provider_config where api_type = #{apiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by id asc

select
from api_provider_config where api_type = #{apiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and is_current = 1 and enabled = 1 order by id asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into api_provider_config (api_type, config_name, provider_type, config_json, enabled, is_current, description, create_time, update_time) values (#{apiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{providerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{configJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{enabled,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{isCurrent,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update api_provider_config set api_type = #{apiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, config_name = #{configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, provider_type = #{providerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, config_json = #{configJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=TINYINT}, is_current = #{isCurrent,jdbcType=TINYINT}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update api_provider_config set is_current = 0 where api_type = #{apiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and is_current = 1
